item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stayed in direct execution mode and analyzed the three complaint incidents without firing a triage framework or treating count-only incidents as repeated same-means repair. It identified likely causes and responsibility boundaries for delivery delay, damaged packaging, and slow follow-up, then synthesized a usable retrospective conclusion. This matches the negative-control expectation to stay asleep."}
